items.name: Ltd (LTD) — Private Company Limited by Shares
items.desc: Мин. капитал: No statutory minimum (€1 typical). 5–10 working days (online)
items.note:
Ответственность: Limited to share capital
Сроки: 5–10 working days (online)
Стоимость: €50 CRO filing fee (online); €100 paper filing
Шаги регистрации:
Choose and reserve company name with CRO (€25, optional)
Prepare Constitution (single-document format under Companies Act 2014)
File Form A1 via CORE online portal with CRO
Appoint at least 1 director (2 if no company secretary bond) and 1 secretary
Provide registered office address in Ireland
Register for Corporation Tax, VAT, and employer PAYE/PRSI with Revenue
Obtain a Tax Clearance Certificate

items.name: DAC — Designated Activity Company
items.desc: Мин. капитал: No statutory minimum. 5–10 working days
items.note:
Ответственность: Limited to share capital
Сроки: 5–10 working days
Стоимость: €50 CRO filing fee
Шаги регистрации:
Prepare Memorandum and Articles of Association (two-document constitution)
Objects clause defines permitted activities
File Form A1 with CRO
Appoint minimum 2 directors and 1 company secretary
Register with Revenue for taxes

items.name: N/A — Sole Trader
items.note:
Ответственность: Unlimited personal liability
Сроки: 1–5 working days
Стоимость: €20 business name registration; Revenue registration free
Шаги регистрации:
Register business name with CRO (if trading under a name other than own)
Register with Revenue for Income Tax and VAT (Form TR1)
Obtain a PPS number if not already held
Register for PRSI (self-employed Class S contributions)

items.name: Planning Permission (Change of Use)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Local Authority Planning Department
Требования:
• Application required for material change of use
• Compliance with local development plan zoning
• Public notice requirements (site notice + newspaper)
Срок действия: 8 weeks (standard decision)
Стоимость: €65–€600 depending on development type

items.name: Fire Safety Certificate
items.note:
Выдаёт: Local Authority Building Control
Требования:
• Required for new buildings, material alterations, change of use
• Fire safety assessment and compliance report
• Building Control Amendment Regulations 2014 compliance
Срок действия: One-off (valid for building)
Стоимость: €125 per application

items.name: Disability Access Certificate
items.note:
Выдаёт: Local Authority Building Control
Требования:
• Required for new non-residential buildings and certain alterations
• Compliance with Part M of Building Regulations
• Access audit and compliance documentation
Срок действия: One-off
Стоимость: €125 per application

items.name: Publican's On-Licence (Full Licence)
items.note:
Выдаёт: District Court / Revenue Commissioners
Требования:
• Application to District Court (annual licensing sessions, usually September)
• Certificate of suitability of premises from fire officer and planning authority
• Revenue tax clearance
• Garda (police) notification — no objections
• Licence transfer or new licence requires extinguishment of existing licence in most cases
Срок действия: Annual (1 October – 30 September)
Стоимость: €250–€3,805 (Revenue excise duty, based on turnover); court costs €500–€2,000; solicitor fees €1,500–€3,000

items.name: Special Restaurant Licence
items.note:
Выдаёт: District Court / Revenue Commissioners
Требования:
• Premises must be a bona fide restaurant (no bar counter)
• Alcohol served only with substantial meals
• Non-alcoholic beverages must be available
• Court application with supporting documentation
Срок действия: Annual
Стоимость: €250+ excise duty + court and legal fees

items.name: Food Business Registration
items.note:
Выдаёт: HSE Environmental Health Service
Требования:
• Notify HSE at least 14 days before opening
• Comply with EC Regulation 852/2004 (food hygiene)
• HACCP-based food safety management system
• Staff food safety training
Срок действия: Ongoing
Стоимость: Free

items.name: Fáilte Ireland Registration (Hotels & Guest Houses)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Fáilte Ireland
Требования:
• Mandatory registration for hotels and guest houses
• Compliance with quality standards and classification criteria
• Annual inspection
Срок действия: Annual
Стоимость: Varies by establishment size

items.name: Registered Electrical Contractor (REC)
items.desc: [Услуги и ремёсла] Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU) / Safe Electric
items.note:
Выдаёт: Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU) / Safe Electric
Требования:
• Qualified electrician with relevant certification
• Registered with Safe Electric programme
• Compliance with National Rules for Electrical Installations (ET 101)
Срок действия: Annual
Стоимость: €600–€1,200/year

items.name: Registered Gas Installer (RGI)
items.desc: [Услуги и ремёсла] Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU) / Register of Gas Installers of Ireland (RGII)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU) / Register of Gas Installers of Ireland (RGII)
Требования:
• Appropriate gas installation qualifications
• Annual assessment and verification
• Public liability insurance
Срок действия: Annual
Стоимость: €400–€900/year

items.name: Construction Industry Registration
items.desc: [Услуги и ремёсла] Construction Industry Register Ireland (CIRI)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Construction Industry Register Ireland (CIRI)
Требования:
• Voluntary but increasingly required for public contracts
• Demonstration of competence, insurance, and tax compliance
Срок действия: Annual
Стоимость: €200–€500

items.name: Industrial Emissions Licence (IEL)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)
Требования:
• Required for activities listed in First Schedule of EPA Act
• Environmental Impact Assessment
• Best Available Techniques (BAT) compliance
• Public consultation period
Срок действия: Reviewed periodically
Стоимость: €2,500–€25,000+ (application fee varies by activity class)

items.name: CE Marking (EU Conformity)
items.desc: [Производство] EU Notified Bodies / Health and Safety Authority
items.note:
Выдаёт: EU Notified Bodies / Health and Safety Authority
Требования:
• Mandatory for products sold in EU/EEA markets
• Conformity assessment procedures per relevant EU Directive
• Technical documentation and Declaration of Conformity
Срок действия: Product-specific
Стоимость: €1,000–€15,000+ depending on product

items.name: IDA Ireland / Enterprise Ireland Grant Eligibility
items.note:
Выдаёт: IDA Ireland (foreign) / Enterprise Ireland (indigenous)
Требования:
• Business plan demonstrating export potential and job creation
• Capital investment and employment commitments
• High Potential Start-Up (HPSU) programme for qualifying companies
Срок действия: Project-based
Стоимость: Free to apply; grants from €50,000 to several million

items.name: Road Haulage Operator Licence
items.note:
Выдаёт: Department of Transport
Требования:
• Professional competence (Transport Manager CPC)
• Financial standing: €9,000 for first vehicle + €5,000 per additional vehicle
• Good repute
• Appropriate operating centre
Срок действия: 5 years (renewable)
Стоимость: €250–€500 application fee

items.name: Driver CPC (Certificate of Professional Competence)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Road Safety Authority (RSA)
Требования:
• Initial CPC qualification for professional drivers
• 35 hours periodic training every 5 years
• Driver Qualification Card issued by RSA
Срок действия: 5 years
Стоимость: €50 card fee + training costs

items.name: Customs / AEO Authorisation
items.note:
Выдаёт: Revenue Commissioners
Требования:
• EU-wide Authorised Economic Operator status
• Full customs compliance record
• Financial solvency and security standards
Срок действия: Ongoing (subject to reassessment)
Стоимость: Free to apply

items.name: Налоговый режим — Розничная торговля
items.note:
vat_standard: 23%
vat_reduced: 13.5% (building services, certain goods); 9% (hospitality, newspapers, sports facilities); 4.8% (livestock, greyhounds); 0% (most food, children's clothing, oral medicines)
corporate_tax: 12.5% (trading income); 25% (passive/non-trading income); 15% minimum effective rate for multinationals with >€750M global revenue (Pillar Two)
notes: Ireland's 12.5% trading rate applies to over 99% of businesses (Pillar Two 15% applies only to large multinationals). R&D tax credit increased to 35% from 2025. Employment Investment Incentive (EII) scheme for equity investors. Knowledge Development Box: 6.25% on qualifying IP income. PRSI employer contribution 11.05%. VAT registration threshold: €80,000 (goods), €40,000 (services).

items.name: Налоговый режим — HoReCa (общепит)
items.note:
vat_standard: 23%
vat_reduced: 9% (restaurant meals, hotel accommodation, catering — extended through 2026 for hospitality from 1 July 2026); 13.5% (certain catering supplies)
corporate_tax: 12.5% (trading income); 25% (non-trading income)
notes: The 9% VAT rate for hospitality has been re-extended. Tips and gratuities: Payment of Wages (Amendment) (Tips and Gratuities) Act 2022 requires fair distribution. Employer PRSI 11.05%. Tourism Marketing Fund grants available via Fáilte Ireland.

items.name: Налоговый режим — Услуги и ремёсла
items.note:
vat_standard: 23%
vat_reduced: 13.5% (building and construction services, repair services); 0% on certain professional services exported
corporate_tax: 12.5% (trading income); 25% (non-trading income)
notes: Relevant Contracts Tax (RCT) applies to construction, forestry, and meat processing subcontractors. Professional services withholding tax (PSWT) at 20% on certain payments by state bodies. Small benefit exemption: €1,000 tax-free per employee per year.

items.name: Налоговый режим — Производство
items.note:
vat_standard: 23%
vat_reduced: 0% on exports outside EU; 13.5% on certain manufactured goods for domestic supply
corporate_tax: 12.5% (trading/manufacturing income); 25% (non-trading); 6.25% (Knowledge Development Box for qualifying IP)
notes: R&D tax credit 35% (increased from 30% in 2025). Accelerated capital allowances for energy-efficient equipment. IDA Ireland grants for foreign direct investment in manufacturing. Ireland is a member of the EU — full access to EU Single Market and customs union with no tariffs on intra-EU trade.

items.name: Налоговый режим — Логистика и склад
items.note:
vat_standard: 23%
vat_reduced: 0% on international transport of goods; 23% on domestic transport services
corporate_tax: 12.5% (trading income); 25% (non-trading income)
notes: EU Single Market and Customs Union membership: no customs duties or border checks on intra-EU goods movement. EU Community Licence required for international road haulage. Carbon tax on fuel (currently €56/tonne CO2). Diesel rebate scheme for qualifying hauliers.

items.name: Обзор бизнес-регистрации — Ireland
items.note: Ирландия: регистрация Ltd через CRO (портал CORE) — €50. Налог на прибыль 12.5% (торговый доход), 25% (пассивный). НДС 23% стандартный, 9% для HoReCa. Pillar Two (15%) касается только мультинационалов с оборотом >€750M. Лицензия на алкоголь через District Court — €250–€3,805 + судебные расходы. Член ЕС: свободный доступ к единому рынку без таможенных пошлин. R&D кредит 35%. Порог НДС: €80K (товары), €40K (услуги).
